channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: DOJ: Yale Med School Admits to Illegal Discrimination Against White and Asian Applicants
item.description: Race cannot be used as a factor in admissions, regardless of applicant scores.

item.title: Trump Endorsement Shapes Final Stage of Texas GOP Senate Runoff
item.description: Texas voters head to the polls Tuesday to conclude one of the most expensive and contentious Senate Republican primaries in state history.

item.title: Memorial Day at 250
item.description: We owe a great debt to a small number of people.

item.title: The USO Does God’s Work
item.description: Memorial Day is set aside for the dead, and rightly so.
